description.value: The vesk deity of conquest, Damoritosh, has gifted (or cursed) you with the divine energy to persevere through the most intense combat situations. The first time each day that you would die, Damoritosh protects you, granting you a sliver of healing and the drive to push through the coming challenge. This prevents you from dying, restores @Damage[5[healing]] Hit Points, and you become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Quickened] for 1 minute. If the cause of your death was a condition or effect that would still cause you to die after regaining Hit Points, such as a high value on the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Doomed] condition, you suppress that condition for 1 minute.
